'''Brochiib''' was a [[Trianii/Legends|Trianii]] colony [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Trianii Space/Legends|Trianii Space]].<ref name="TEA" /> [[Trianii Rangers]] [[Atuarre]] and [[Keeheen]] stopped [[thionarx]] dealers on the planet.<ref name="HSCS">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref>
